Our Services

Electrical Services We Provide

From EV charger installs to full panel upgrades — every residential electrical need in Orange County, handled right.

EV Charger Installation
Professional Level 2 EV charger installation with panel evaluation, dedicated circuits, and code-compliant setup.
Book Now →
Electrical Panel Upgrades
Replace outdated or overloaded panels to improve safety and meet modern electrical power demands.
Book Now →
Electrical Troubleshooting
Fast, accurate diagnosis of tripping breakers, flickering lights, or power loss with reliable solutions.
Book Now →
Lighting Installation
Indoor and outdoor lighting including recessed, landscape, and security lights. Upgrade to LED.
Book Now →
Electrical Repairs
Safe repairs for outlets, switches, breakers, and wiring. Fast restoration with full safety compliance.
Book Now →
Electrical Safety Inspections
Comprehensive evaluations for home buyers, sellers, or insurance. We identify hazards and fix them.
Book Now →
Dedicated Circuits
Dedicated power supplies for EV chargers, ovens, and HVAC systems. Prevent overloads and ensure stable power.
Book Now →
Surge Protection
Whole-home surge protection against power surges and lightning, installed at your main panel.
Book Now →
Generator Interlock
Safe interlock systems that let generators power essential circuits during outages without risk.
Book Now →
Ceiling Fan Installation
Professional fan installation and replacement with fan-rated boxes for secure, balanced operation.
Book Now →
GFCI & AFCI Protection
Code-compliant safety outlet and breaker upgrades to prevent electrical shock and fire hazards.
Book Now →
Landscape & Outdoor Lighting
Pathway, accent, and garden lighting designed for durability, beauty, and energy efficiency.
Book Now →
